title: Update route_packet pseudocode and address classification for 02xx local-mesh-first then Yggdrasil fallback
description: Revise section 7.2 routing decision logic, is_off_mesh(), comment about GUA, and the address classification table in spec/05-routing.md to prioritize local mesh (gradient/LOADng/RPL) for 02xx destinations before falling back to Yggdrasil routing. Remove ULA/GUA references.
